name: X-Golf Methuen Indoor Golf & Bar
address: 90 Pleasant Valley St Unit 105, Methuen, MA 01844
about: X-Golf Methuen offers indoor golf simulator experiences with a full-service bar and pub-style food. It features 8 state-of-the-art golf simulators for play, practice, and entertainment, accommodating groups of up to 6 people per bay. The venue caters to golfers of all skill levels, offering flexible hourly rates, seasonal memberships, private lessons, and organized leagues. It's designed as a social and golf entertainment hub suitable for casual play, group events, and serious practice sessions.
why_golfers_like_it: Highly accurate simulators with advanced camera and laser technology
Social atmosphere combining golf with a full bar and food menu
Flexible pricing and membership options for various budgets and schedules
Available for private events and corporate outings

food_and_drink.notes: Pub-style food available, including pizza, burger sliders, and more
Full bar with beer, seltzer, and other beverages

faq.question: Do I need my own clubs?
faq.answer: Club rentals are available for both men's and women's clubs.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drink?
faq.answer: Outside food and drink are not permitted as the venue offers a full bar and pub-style food menu.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: It generally takes about one hour for an individual to play 18 holes. For multiple players, it takes approximately one hour per person added.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, children of all ages are welcome at X-Golf Methuen.
